sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115443" key="yeuda/nwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδ-άνωρ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sham man,</tr_> epith. of Dionysus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
